applications: Appliance casings and home appliances with heat resistance characteristics
Prior to processing, drying is advised in a desiccant dehumidifying hopper dryer.
Inlet air dew point of -20°F (-29°C) or below is recommended to achieve a moisture content of 0.1%.
Typical drying conditions: 2 hours at 180° – 190°F (82° – 88°C). 4 hours at 160° – 170°F (71° – 77°C) if lower temperature is preferred.
4 hours at 160° – 170°F (71° – 77°C) if lower temperature is preferred.
